categories.label: Missing Funds
categories.description: User reports funds not received or missing from wallet after sending or receiving

categories.label: Wrong Network
categories.description: Funds sent via incorrect or unsupported network, causing visibility or access issues

categories.label: Bridge Delay
categories.description: Bridge transaction is delayed, stuck, or appears failed but may still be processing

categories.label: Wallet Confusion
categories.description: User confused about wallet setup, token visibility, account access, or missing token imports

categories.label: Scam Risk
categories.description: Potential scam, phishing attempt, suspicious DMs, or unauthorized activity reported

categories.label: Out of Scope
categories.description: Query is not related to Web3 support or the supported ecosystem

transactionHash.label: Transaction Hash
transactionHash.description: Blockchain transaction identifier (0x... hex, Solana base58, etc.)

network.label: Network
network.description: The blockchain network used (Ethereum, BSC, Polygon, Arbitrum, Solana, etc.)

token.label: Token
token.description: The token symbol involved (USDC, ETH, USDT, BTC, etc.)

platform.label: Platform
platform.description: The platform or exchange mentioned (Binance, MetaMask, OKX, Phantom, etc.)
